data.title: 国际服签到礼物「Sensei, I'm always truly grateful.」
data.summary: Sensei, a special gift has arrived from the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council! Log in during the even
data.body:
Sensei, a special gift has arrived from the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council!
Log in during the event period to receive a Pyroxene gift that…somehow smells delicious?

And don’t forget to check out the newly updated Main Story Vol.5 — Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3203329
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/10355/v9WHdW97bcxidUyQpgXPRbIN42aFyclj.png)
